items.title: At least 13 killed in large-scale Russian missile and drone strikes on Kyiv
items.summary: Russia launched its biggest strikes on the city in weeks with children among the "significant number" of casualties, Ukrainian officials say.

items.title: Стратегические бомбардировщики ВВС США B-52 Stratofortress покинули Великобританию, где были р [...]
items.summary: Стратегические бомбардировщики ВВС США B-52 Stratofortress покинули Великобританию, где были размещены для использования в ходе боевых действий против Ирана, пишет портал The War Zone (TWZ).По его сведениям, шесть бомбардировщиков в две группы по три воздушных судна покинули 1 июля авиабазу Фэрфорд. Эти самолеты применялись для нанесения ударов по территории исламской республики.

items.title: China can help Ukraine recover from war and advance industry, ambassador says
items.summary:
China can provide “all-round” support for Ukraine’s post-war industrial recovery, Beijing’s envoy to Kyiv said while reaffirming his country’s commitment to pushing for a ceasefire and a political settlement for a conflict in its fifth year.
The remarks were made by China’s ambassador to Ukraine, Ma Shengkun, in an article published by the Interfax-Ukraine news agency on Tuesday, marking the 15th

items.title: Mass Mournings,6 Days and 2 Countries: Iran Prepares to Bury Supreme Leader
items.summary: Long-delayed funeral ceremonies for Ayatollah Ali Khamenei, killed during U.S.-Israeli strikes at the war’s outset, are set to begin Friday. For the regime, it is a critical moment to demonstrate that it has endured.

items.title: Are the EU and China heading for a trade war? 5 things to know
Gaza marks 1,000 days of war. Palestinians there face an uncertain future
items.summary:
It’s the 1000th day of war since a Hamas-led attack on Israel that sparked the war in Gaza. Other conflicts have emerged in the region, and fragile ceasefires show scars of persistent attacks. Both Israelis and Palestinians are weary of the strain.
The fate of over 2 million Palestinians in Gaza, largely displaced and living amid ruins, remains uncertain. Israeli forces controlled over half of the

items.title: With a Fragile Ceasefire under Threat, What Future for the Strait of Hormuz?
items.summary: The U.S.-Israeli war with Iran prompted Tehran to close the Strait of Hormuz, allowing only selected ships to pass through. In this Q&A, Crisis Group experts Yasmine Farouk, Chris Newton and Ali Vaez consider what could come next in this vital maritime trade corridor.

items.title: Oil prices fall to levels not seen since start of US-Israel war on Iran
items.summary: Brent falls below $71 a barrel amid reports of progress in talks to end the war.

items.title: China’s Private Refiners Snap Up Middle East Oil as Prices Slide
items.summary: China’s independent refiners are taking advantage of cheaper Middle Eastern oil after flows accelerated through the Strait of Hormuz, snapping up barrels from producers including Saudi Arabia and Iraq.

items.summary: ❗️Посольство РФ в Швеции подверглось новому нападению с использованием БПЛА, на одном из них был муляж взрывного устройства, сообщает дипмиссия.Вся ответственность за продолжение атак на дипмиссию РФ в Швеции и их последствия ложатся на шведскую сторону, заявили в посольстве.

items.title: Omani Fertilizer Firm Draws $12 Billion In Orders
items.summary: Oman India Fertiliser Co.’s initial public offering has drawn over $12 billion in orders, in the Middle East’s largest listing since the outbreak of the regional conflict. The fertilizer producer is set to raise $678 million via the share sale, Laura Gardner Cuesta reports. (Source: Bloomberg)

items.title: A Long Gulf War Can Starve the World. A Hormuz Transit Deal Could Save Millions.
EU and NATO Members Grapple with War in Iran
items.summary: This week on War & Peace, Olga speaks with Crisis Group’s head of EU Affairs, Lisa Musiol, about how the EU, its members and European members of NATO have responded to the U.S.-Israeli war with Iran and what it reveals about EU foreign policy and its constraints.

items.title: ЦБ: снижение ставки не означает, что Банк России и далее будет действовать такими шагами
Why Hong Kong has become this year’s worst-performing stock market
items.summary:
There are many disconnects in financial markets. One of them is Japan’s benchmark 10-year bond yield, which currently stands at just 2.7 per cent despite the country’s large public debt burden – more than 240 per cent of economic output.
